# String Compare

String three-way comparison operator

```perl
$cmp_result = $left cmp $right;
```

## Expected Compilation Outcomes

### Clean Perl Output

```perl
$cmp_result = $left cmp $right;
```

### Typed Perl Output

```perl
$cmp_result = $left cmp $right;
```
